title: Taaphur
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Taaphurs''' were ancient [[Yuuzhan Vong]] sea creatures that had died out long before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. However, their genetic structure was kept in [[qahsa]]s and was used as the basis for several derivative creatures.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{Mo}}

[[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]]
